---
name: research-perspective-review
description: Use when research or experiment-heavy changes need independent parallel review across reproducibility, scientific computing, benchmarking, artifacts, FAIR-style data, and reporting.
---

# Research Perspective Review

1. Read `agents/skills/research-perspective-review.md`.
1. Use this as a research-specific extension to critical review and report review, not a replacement.
1. Default to all six perspectives. Reduce to a subset only when the skipped perspectives are explicitly justified by scope.
1. Return findings first and group them into `fix now`, `follow-up`, and `delete-ok`.
